name: DoD zero-trust profile: a clean IaC with encryption and logging passes green
command:
printf 'resource "x" { encrypt = true
 logging = true
}
' > zt.tf
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-conventions.sh" --tool terraform --iac zt.tf --ruleset "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-conventions/dod-zero-trust.yaml"
